risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Continuity
risk_summary: Board of Directors transition in June 2025 following completion of earlier tenure, creating potential governance disruption to project implementation and decision-making processes.
evidence_quote: Upon completion of the tenure of the earlier Board of Directors, the Cabinet approved a new Board of Directors in June 2025.

risk_title: Government Financing Shortfall Impacting Project Implementation
risk_summary: Government co-financing remains below agreed levels, with funds expected only after new budget allocation in August 2025, creating cash flow risks for ongoing project activities.
evidence_quote: Government financing remains below the agreed level; funds are expected to be allocated in August '25 based on the new budget.
